#  DISC Quantum Random Number Generators
DISC performs continuous hardware-based entropy evaluation on each generated key providing live quantum assurance, mitigating silent failure and environmental attacks. This is ideal for security engineers developing the next generation of solutions.
[Learn more[3]](https://quantum-dice.com/docs/disc-explainer.pdf)[Read about the science[4]](https://quantum-dice.com/docs/disc-scientific-paper.pdf)
![DISC Protocol Logo](https://quantum-dice.com/images/disc_logo_dark_blue.png)![DISC Protocol Logo](https://quantum-dice.com/images/disc_logo_light_blue.png)
## Available now as hardware QRNGs or Quantum Entropy-as-a-Service (QEaaS)
All our QRNG solutions come with industry-leading generation rates and benefit from best-in-class security with our patented DISC protocol.
### [SparQ System on Module](https://quantum-dice.com/products/qrng/sparq)### [VERTEX PCIe Card](https://quantum-dice.com/products/qrng/vertex)### [APEX 1U Rackmount Server](https://quantum-dice.com/products/qrng/apex)### [QEaaS Entropy-as-a-Service](https://quantum-dice.com/products/qrng/qeaas)
